caption:
Friday at Rani. The energy is different.

Fridays are our busiest day—and for good reason. It's when our patients come in to get weekend-ready:

• Morning: Back-to-back Botox appointments. Quick, precise, out the door in 15 minutes.
• Late morning: HydraFacials for the glow-before-the-event crowd.
• Afternoon: Laser sessions, RF Microneedling, and Sofwave treatments for patients who want the weekend for any mild recovery.
• End of day: Vitamin injection walk-ins for an energy boost heading into the weekend.

Our team moves in sync. Rooms turn over seamlessly. Music plays softly in the background. There's an espresso machine in the lounge.

It doesn't feel like a medical clinic. It feels like a sanctuary that happens to deliver clinical-grade results.

That's by design.

Experience a Friday at Rani. Book your appointment for this week.
mediaDescription: Day-in-the-life Reel: Quick montage of a busy Friday at the clinic. Morning prep, patients arriving, treatment snapshots (hands only, no faces without consent), team working together, lounge area with espresso. Upbeat yet sophisticated energy. Golden hour lighting where possible.
